'''sozhamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccoaxial|buccoaxial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccoaxial|buccoaxial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sozhamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sozhamithi|sozhamithi]] || [[word:sozhamiji|sozhamiji]] || [[word:sozhamishi|sozhamishi]] || [[word:sozhamiki|sozhamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sozhamuthuthu|sozhamuthuthu]] || [[word:sozhamujuju|sozhamujuju]] || [[word:sozhamushushu|sozhamushushu]] || [[word:sozhamukuku|sozhamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sozhamuthu|sozhamuthu]] || [[word:sozhamuju|sozhamuju]] || [[word:sozhamushu|sozhamushu]] || [[word:sozhamuku|sozhamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sozhamufthuf|sozhamufthuf]] || [[word:sozhamufjuf|sozhamufjuf]] || [[word:sozhamufshuf|sozhamufshuf]] || [[word:sozhamufkuf|sozhamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sozhamethe|sozhamethe]] || [[word:sozhameje|sozhameje]] || [[word:sozhameshe|sozhameshe]] || [[word:sozhameke|sozhameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sozhamothotho|sozhamothotho]] || [[word:sozhamojojo|sozhamojojo]] || [[word:sozhamoshosho|sozhamoshosho]] || [[word:sozhamokoko|sozhamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sozhamotho|sozhamotho]] || [[word:sozhamojo|sozhamojo]] || [[word:sozhamosho|sozhamosho]] || [[word:sozhamoko|sozhamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sozhamofthof|sozhamofthof]] || [[word:sozhamofjof|sozhamofjof]] || [[word:sozhamofshof|sozhamofshof]] || [[word:sozhamofkof|sozhamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sozhamïfthïf|sozhamïfthïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfjïf|sozhamïfjïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfshïf|sozhamïfshïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfkïf|sozhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sozhamïfthïfthïf|sozhamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfjïfjïf|sozhamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfshïfshïf|sozhamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfkïfkïf|sozhamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sozhamïfthïf|sozhamïfthïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfjïf|sozhamïfjïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfshïf|sozhamïfshïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfkïf|sozhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sozhamïfthïf|sozhamïfthïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfjïf|sozhamïfjïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfshïf|sozhamïfshïf]] || [[word:sozhamïfkïf|sozhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sozhamæthæ|sozhamæthæ]] || [[word:sozhamæjæ|sozhamæjæ]] || [[word:sozhamæshæ|sozhamæshæ]] || [[word:sozhamækæ|sozhamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sozhamathatha|sozhamathatha]] || [[word:sozhamajaja|sozhamajaja]] || [[word:sozhamashasha|sozhamashasha]] || [[word:sozhamakaka|sozhamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sozhamatha|sozhamatha]] || [[word:sozhamaja|sozhamaja]] || [[word:sozhamasha|sozhamasha]] || [[word:sozhamaka|sozhamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sozhamafthaf|sozhamafthaf]] || [[word:sozhamafjaf|sozhamafjaf]] || [[word:sozhamafshaf|sozhamafshaf]] || [[word:sozhamafkaf|sozhamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sozhamasha|sozhamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sozhamshësha|sozhamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sozhamrosha|sozhamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sozhamusha|sozhamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sozhamyasha|sozhamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosozhamnkshësha|gosozhamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosozhamnkrosha|gosozhamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosozhamnkmusha|gosozhamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosozhamnkyasha|gosozhamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sozhazhamasha|sozhazhamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sozhazhamshësha|sozhazhamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sozhazhamrosha|sozhazhamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sozhazhamusha|sozhazhamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sozhazhamyasha|sozhazhamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosozhazhamnkshësha|gosozhazhamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosozhazhamnkrosha|gosozhazhamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosozhazhamnkmusha|gosozhazhamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosozhazhamnkyasha|gosozhazhamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sezhæmasha|sezhæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sezhæmshësha|sezhæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sezhæmrosha|sezhæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sezhæmusha|sezhæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sezhæmyasha|sezhæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosezhæmnkshësha|gosezhæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosezhæmnkrosha|gosezhæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosezhæmnkmusha|gosezhæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosezhæmnkyasha|gosezhæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sozhfamasha|sozhfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sozhfamshësha|sozhfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sozhfamrosha|sozhfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sozhfamusha|sozhfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sozhfamyasha|sozhfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosozhfamnkshësha|gosozhfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosozhfamnkrosha|gosozhfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosozhfamnkmusha|gosozhfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosozhfamnkyasha|gosozhfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
